docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT KELLER, ROBERT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF PAGE, JEANNETTE
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2023 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT PAGE, JEANNETTE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT KELLER, ROBERT $5,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,315.00, PARTIES AGREED THAT DEFENDANT WAS HOLDING A SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $3,395, HE RETURNED $595, AND HE WITHHELD $2,800. PLAINTIFF ACCEPTS THAT $200 COULD BE WITHHELD FOR YARD CLEANING, BUT CONTESTS WITHHOLDING OF REMAINING $2,600. DEFENDANT DID NOT PROVE THE REASONABLENESS OF THE WITHHOLDING OF ANY OF THE $2,600. (SEE CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(1)) THE COURT AWARDS AN ADDITIONAL $2,600 IN STATUTORY DAMAGES, FINDING THAT THE SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS WITHHELD IN BAD FAITH. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KELLER, ROBERT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED APR-06-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KELLER, ROBERT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO JUN-06-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF JEANNETTE PAGE IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS PAULINE RAFAEL. DEFENDANT ROBERT KELLER IS PRESENT. PARTIES ORALLY STIPULATE TO ALLOW THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO HEAR THEIR CASE. HEARD WITH CASE CSM-23-866757. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAGE, JEANNETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLER, ROBERT $5,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,315.00, PLAINTIFF PROVED THAT THE WITHHELD AMOUNT OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS NOT COMPLIANT WITH THE LAW. THE AMOUNT WITHHELD IS DOUBLED DUE TO THE LONG DELAY BUT NOT TRIPLED AS DEFENDANT HAD COVID IN LATE 2022. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant ROBERT KELLER, the moving party, in Pro Per.
Respondent/Plaintiff JEANNETTE PAGE, the opposing party, in Pro Per.
Witness PAULINE RAFAEL is present for Respondent/Plaintiff JEANNETTE PAGE.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant/Defendant ROBERT KELLER testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - Email from Robert Keller to Jeannette Page
Exhibit B - Email from Faustino De Los Santos to Robert Keller
Exhibit C - Painting Invoice
Exhibit D - Cleaning Invoice
Exhibit E - Photographs (12) of the unit; taken in early December 2022

Respondent/Plaintiff JEANNETTE PAGE testifies on her own behalf. Witness PAULINE RAFAEL testifies. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Demand letter from Jeanette Page to Robert Keller
Exhibit 2 - Letter from Robert Keller to Jeanette Page re security deposit
Exhibit 3 - Information feed re security deposit from the State
Exhibit 4 - Painting Invoice (identical to Exhibit C)
Exhibit 5 - Cleaning Invoice (identical to Exhibit D)
Exhibit 6 - Cleaner invoice; end of November 2022
Exhibit 7 - Photographs (7) of the unit; taken on November 27, 2022.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court orders matter submitted and takes matter under submission. All introduced documentary evidence are returned to the offering party. Judge: Honorable JOSEPH M. QUINN; Clerk: C. Cheng; Reporter: Not Reported; Bailiff: None Present. (D606)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Set For Trial On Aug-09-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 606

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Continued To Aug-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-08-2023 Judgment Entered
